channel.title: Whamcloud Community JIRA
channel.description: This file is an XML representation of an issue

item.title: [LU-19364] IPv6 lnet-selftest test_smoke: FAIL: /tmp/smoke.sh failed: 255
item.description:
This issue was created by maloo for jianyu <yujian@whamcloud.com>

This issue relates to the following test suite run: https://testing.whamcloud.com/test_sets/c14acd0f-9135-406e-adc3-36e963933098

test_smoke failed with the following error:

No nodes added successfully, deleting group c
Group is deleted
Invalid nid: fd33:3981:3213:f020:0:5254:57:9e95@tcp
Ignore invalid id list fd33:3981:3213:f020:0:5254:57:9e95@tcp
Invalid nid: fd33:3981:3213:f020:0:5254:70:da83@tcp
Ignore invalid id list fd33:3981:3213:f020:0:5254:70:da83@tcp
Invalid nid: fd33:3981:3213:f020:0:5254:be:9ad5@tcp
Ignore invalid id list fd33:3981:3213:f020:0:5254:be:9ad5@tcp
No nodes added successfully, deleting group s
Group is deleted
=====================================
Listing of bad_group should not crash
=====================================
Reader error: 'Object not found' at 0
Reader error: 'Object not found' at 0
Can't find test in current session
Starting client trevis-76vm4.trevis.whamcloud.com,trevis-76vm5:  -o user_xattr,flock fd33:3981:3213:f020:0:5254:57:9e95@tcp:/lustre /mnt/lustre
CMD: trevis-76vm4.trevis.whamcloud.com,trevis-76vm5 mkdir -p /mnt/lustre
CMD: trevis-76vm4.trevis.whamcloud.com,trevis-76vm5 
running=\$(mount | grep -c /mnt/lustre' ');
rc=0;
if [ \$running -eq 0 ] ; then
	mkdir -p /mnt/lustre;
	mount -t lustre  -o user_xattr,flock fd33:3981:3213:f020:0:5254:57:9e95@tcp:/lustre /mnt/lustre;
	rc=\$?;
fi;
exit \$rc
Started clients trevis-76vm4.trevis.whamcloud.com,trevis-76vm5: 
CMD: trevis-76vm4.trevis.whamcloud.com,trevis-76vm5 mount | grep /mnt/lustre' '
fd33:3981:3213:f020:0:5254:57:9e95@tcp:/lustre on /mnt/lustre type lustre (rw,checksum,encrypt,flock,lazystatfs,lruresize,nolock,statfs_project,nouser_fid2path,user_xattr,verbose)
fd33:3981:3213:f020:0:5254:57:9e95@tcp:/lustre on /mnt/lustre type lustre (rw,checksum,encrypt,flock,lazystatfs,lruresize,nolock,statfs_project,nouser_fid2path,user_xattr,verbose)
CMD: trevis-76vm5 PATH=/usr/lib64/lustre/tests:/usr/lib/lustre/tests:/usr/lib64/lustre/tests:/opt/iozone/bin:/opt/iozone/bin:/usr/lib64/lustre/tests/mpi:/usr/lib64/lustre/tests/racer:/usr/lib64/lustre/../lustre-iokit/sgpdd-survey:/usr/lib64/lustre/tests:/usr/lib64/lustre/utils/gss:/usr/lib64/lustre/utils:/opt/iozone/bin:/root/.local/bin:/root/bin:/usr/lib64/openmpi/bin:/usr/share/Modules/bin:/usr/local/sbin:/usr/local/bin:/usr/sbin:/usr/bin:/usr/sbin:/sbin::/sbin:/bin:/usr/sbin: NAME=autotest_config 		TESTLOG_PREFIX=/autotest/autotest-1/2025-09-10/lustre-master_full-dne-ipv6-part-2_4652_44_bfb5f5d7-d7af-469d-a828-786979a179ef//lnet-selftest TESTNAME=test_smoke 		CONFIG=/usr/lib64/lustre/tests/cfg/autotest_config.sh bash rpc.sh set_default_debug \"vfstrace rpctrace dlmtrace neterror ha config ioctl super lfsck\" \"all\" 
trevis-76vm5: CMD: trevis-24vm2 hostname -I
trevis-76vm5: trevis-76vm5.trevis.whamcloud.com: executing set_default_debug vfstrace rpctrace dlmtrace neterror ha config ioctl super lfsck all
 lnet-selftest test_smoke: @@@@@@ FAIL: /tmp/smoke.sh failed: 255

Test session details:
clients: https://build.whamcloud.com/job/lustre-master/4652 - 5.14.0-570.37.1.el9_6.x86_64
servers: https://build.whamcloud.com/job/lustre-master/4652 - 5.14.0-570.37.1_lustre.el9.x86_64

<<Please provide additional information about the failure here>>

VVVVVVV DO NOT REMOVE LINES BELOW, Added by Maloo for auto-association VVVVVVV
lnet-selftest test_smoke - /tmp/smoke.sh failed: 255

status.description: A resolution has been taken, and it is awaiting verification by reporter. From here issues are either reopened, or are closed.

comments.comment:
The subtest is skipped in https://review.whamcloud.com/61747 ("LU-19323 tests: add lnet-selftest test smoke into IPv6 except list").
After LU-19323 is resolved, the subtest can be removed from the always except list.
I think that will now take effect due to the landing of https://review.whamcloud.com/c/fs/lustre-release/+/61337
Perhaps this test should just be added to the always accept list until lnet selftest support for IPv6 is present?
